calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
David G. Mendez, Esq. appeared with plaintiff and managing owner Vikram D. Devdhara.
Plaintiff was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Lisa Blackstone, a/k/a Elsa Blackstone.

The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Vacate dated 01/08/08-------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Vikram D. Devdhara and against defendant LISA BLACKSTONE, a/k/a ELSA BLACKSTONE as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from defendant LISA BLACKSTONE, a/k/a ELSA BLACKSTONE Rent and Per Diem in the sum of $4,373.00, Costs in the amount of $230.00, for a total judgment of $4,603.00.
Plaintiff Vikram D. Devdhara is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 130 Eddy Street, #408, San Francisco, CA 94102. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vikram D. Devdhara, plaintiff
David Gerard Mendez, Esq. for plaintiff

No appearance by defendant Lisa Blackstone.

Settlement conference off calendar. Trial date remains.

Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
